benchmark_panel.label: Crypto Trading Intelligence
benchmark_panel.description: Crypto strategy evaluation, execution discipline, and market-adaptive trading workflows.
benchmark_panel.rationale: Existing mature benchmark chip with clear strategy loops and durable market signal.

benchmark_panel.label: Startup YC Intelligence
benchmark_panel.description: Founder decision support around startup formation, validation, growth, and fundraising.
benchmark_panel.rationale: Existing benchmark chip for startup specialization and repeated founder workflow mastery.

benchmark_panel.label: AI Coding Workflow
benchmark_panel.description: Prompt-to-code workflow acceleration, codebase navigation, and developer throughput improvement.
benchmark_panel.rationale: Strong developer workflow benchmark with clear tooling demand and visible ecosystem pull.

benchmark_panel.label: MCP Server Development
benchmark_panel.description: MCP server scaffolding, packaging, testing, and integration workflows for developers.
benchmark_panel.rationale: High-fit benchmark for protocol-native developer tooling in the current ecosystem.

benchmark_panel.label: AI Agent Architecture
benchmark_panel.description: Agent patterns, tool selection, prompt engineering, evaluation frameworks.
benchmark_panel.rationale: AI agents are #1 category on Product Hunt 2026. MCP has 10,000+ servers.

discovered_opportunities.label: Security Control Crosswalk Copilot
discovered_opportunities.description: Builds and maintains a reusable control-and-evidence crosswalk across SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, and similar frameworks.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: Hyperproof says teams repeat administrative work when they map frameworks one at a time and re-collect evidence, while ControlMap and practitioner discussion describe one control mapped to many frameworks with evidence reuse as the operational win.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: mapping one internal control baseline to multiple external framework requirements
candidate_context.mastery_surface: reducing repeated evidence collection by learning reusable control crosswalks and evidence mappings
candidate_context.user_value_loop: ingest a new framework request, map it to the control baseline, attach reusable evidence, and refine the crosswalk after auditor or customer review

discovered_opportunities.label: Vendor Assertion Evidence Verifier
discovered_opportunities.description: Requests, validates, and tracks supporting artifacts behind vendor questionnaire claims for high-risk reviews.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: UpGuard and Safe Security both describe repetitive questionnaires, inconsistent responses, and verification difficulty as core TPRM bottlenecks, and Safe Security explicitly recommends requesting recent supporting artifacts for critical control assertions instead of trusting questionnaire answers alone.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: turning self-reported questionnaire answers into verified evidence packets for vendor risk teams
candidate_context.mastery_surface: learning which artifact types, freshness windows, and follow-ups actually resolve high-risk vendor assertions
candidate_context.user_value_loop: parse vendor answers, request supporting evidence, verify artifact freshness and scope, and update the vendor evidence profile for future reviews

discovered_opportunities.label: Trust Center Gap Copilot
discovered_opportunities.description: Prepares the exact missing documents, report access workflows, and follow-up answers needed when a trust center does not fully satisfy a customer security review.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: Cyberday positions trust centers as a way to cut repetitive security reviews, and practitioners still report that customers ask for the same evidence in different formats, leaving a recurring gap-handling layer after the trust center is in place.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: closing the gap between reusable trust-center content and bespoke customer security review asks
candidate_context.mastery_surface: learning which trust-center gaps recur and how to answer them with minimal manual pre-sales and security effort
candidate_context.user_value_loop: detect repeated customer asks, point to existing trust-center assets, package missing evidence, and update reusable trust-center content after each review

shocks.description: A tool goes viral and creates massive awareness for the domain.

shocks.description: Major open source AI model released free, lowers barrier to entry.
